# Bootstrap Icons

- Upstream: https://github.com/twbs/icons
- Site: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/
- License: MIT (see `LICENSE`)
- Acquired: 2026-04-21 via `git clone --depth 1`
- Layout: flat `icons/` directory, all SVGs at top level

## Count

- Total icons: **2078** (outline + filled variants included as separate files)
- Size on disk: ~8.1 MB

## Sample filenames

```
0-circle-fill.svg
0-circle.svg
1-circle-fill.svg
1-circle.svg
alarm-fill.svg
alarm.svg
arrow-down-circle-fill.svg
arrow-down-circle.svg
bag-check-fill.svg
bag-check.svg
bell-fill.svg
bell.svg
bookmark-fill.svg
bookmark.svg
broadcast-pin.svg
broadcast.svg
calendar-event.svg
camera-fill.svg
chat-dots.svg
check-circle-fill.svg
```

Naming convention: base name plus `-fill` for the solid variant. Most icons ship in outline/filled pairs.

## Notes

- Visual character: 1px-ish stroke, geometric, restrained. Good neutral-utility set.
- Convention favors compound names (`arrow-down-up`, `file-earmark-text`).
